title: Unsafe Deserialization
description: Deserializing untrusted data using pickle, marshal, yaml.load, or similar unsafe mechanisms can lead to arbitrary code execution, violating SOC2 CC6.1 and CC6.8.

finding.message: Unsafe deserialization sink '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use safe alternatives: yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load(), JSON with typed schemas, Protocol Buffers.
Never deserialize data received over the network without verifying a cryptographic signature first.
If pickle/marshal is unavoidable, restrict to data from trusted internal sources only.
Consider signing serialized payloads with an HMAC before transmission.
